thesis: The strongest combined system is a COMPOUNDING KNOWLEDGE STORE with a CALIBRATION-HONEST DECISION ENGINE on top — a Karpathy-style compiled wiki of flat, typed, interlinked per-account dossiers that accrue insight one-directionally (compiled and superseded, never bidirectionally merged), feeding a deterministic Python decision engine (pacing/coverage/RS-rank/cockpit + Jack's deep-analytics suite refactored into tested code) that tells the AM what to do today and drafts the outbound behind a single-recipient clearance gate. The operator surface is Jack's 12 named slash-skills; underneath each skill is a THIN wrapper over the tested engine — the name is the ergonomics, the Python is the correctness. It is stronger than EITHER parent because it fuses the two things neither had: it takes Jack's PRODUCTION assets (named skills, per-section ownership matrix, the analyses suite, the enriched registry, narrative dual-load, file-locking, the danger-zone failure catalog, production-proven file-health limits) and grafts them onto AM Brain's PRINCIPLED spine (determinism-in-code I-1, rules-first-numbers-last I-2, unknown!=zero I-3, the draft-boundary clearance gate, the two-tier mirror/authored memory model, single-writer discipline) — so the synthesis keeps Jack's operational maturity AND AM Brain's safety/calibration discipline, while inheriting NEITHER parent's catastrophic failure mode (Jack's silent-data-loss bidirectional merge; AM Brain's hidden-engine-with-no-named-surface and its untested in-prompt math). It is genuinely unserved by Meta's GA Sales AI (~35 subagents) because Sales AI is READ-ONLY, browser-based, stateless-per-query, single-account, and runs no proactive daily loop and drafts no outbound — whereas this system is proactive (a scheduled tiered-poll daily cockpit), action-drafting (gated Gmail drafts), persistent (a compounding per-account dossier that gets smarter every meeting), portfolio-wide (reasons across all 33 accounts at once), and self-hosted; where it overlaps Sales AI (CRM reads, eval-judge grounding) it REUSES it rather than rebuilding.

invariants.law: Determinism in code, judgment in the model. ALL classification, joining, thresholding, ranking, curve-fitting, and regression is tested Python (engine/classifiers.py, engine/analyses/*.py); the LLM does language + genuinely-ambiguous judgment only, in exactly three places: (1) extract structured facts from unstructured prose, (2) compose operator/client-facing language, (3) render low-confidence/ambiguous items as questions. A skill that asks the LLM to compute a number is a bug.
invariants.why: Long LLM skills (1400+ lines) drift, misclassify, skip steps; a log-curve fit or diminishing-returns threshold computed in-prompt is unverifiable and silently mis-advises spend. Curve-fitting/regression is the least-ambiguous candidate for code-over-LLM.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-1, extended by [synth] to cover Jack's analyses suite which Jack ran as in-prompt LLM math.

invariants.law: Rules first, numbers last. Categorical bands order everything (RS rank: R0 pins -> R2 gates -> R1 boosts -> R3 band-sort -> R4 numeric-tiebreak); a numeric score MUST NOT reorder across bands, only break ties within an identical band. Low-confidence / required-human-judgment items render as a QUESTION, not a recommendation.
invariants.why: Kills confident-but-wrong output; a numeric score reordering across bands is exactly how a ranking lies.

invariants.law: Unknown != zero. Never fabricate. Absent/non-numeric/non-finite inputs render as unknown (NOT 0/false/pass) and branch to an explicit unknown/unscored outcome (Number.isFinite-guard every external numeric before any comparison); uncalibrated pacing surfaces carry a PACING UNCALIBRATED banner; an uncalibrated curve carries an [UNCALIBRATED CURVE] banner and may NOT enter a client draft; unsourced proof points render [NEEDS CLEARED BENCHMARK].
invariants.why: The #1 way dashboards lie is defaulting missing to zero/pass; NaN-blind comparison gates pass NaN as all-false.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-3 / SPEC DM-4, CONF-1; Number.isFinite guard from [ext] project-memory NaN-blind-gates.

invariants.law: Mirror the system of record; never invent its keys. rs_id/org_id/sfid/ad_account_id copied verbatim; the brain annotates, never authors CRM/ads truth. Human-set fields living inside otherwise-generated files (status, tier, scorecard_status, RS impact_override/ease_override) are HUMAN-ONLY and never auto-overwritten.
invariants.why: Keeps the brain subordinate to CRM/ads; the registry/SoR keys are the join contract — fabricating one undercounts or mis-joins silently. Jack learned in production that human-set fields live inside engine-regenerated files and must be carved out.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-4 + [Jack] section-12 human-only carve-out (the field-level enumeration AM Brain leaves latent under DM-8).

invariants.law: Field-level ownership over a per-FILE single-owner matrix. Every file/field is human-owned (agent proposes diffs), AM-confirmed (agent parks under suggested:, operator confirms), generated (agent overwrites freely, regenerable), or append-only (append only; correct via tombstone, never edit). The matrix is keyed skill x (file + protected-field-list) with explicit write-mode {overwrite-free | append-only | rewrite | propose-under-suggested}, machine-checkable in _system/ownership.md, enforced by the write-guard on EVERY write. trust_level/current_mood change ONLY on operator confirm.
invariants.why: Safe autonomy over shared structure. Jack's per-section owner-table is mechanically-checkable documentation of write authority (better than prose); AM Brain's field-level grain (freeze trust_level even inside a /capture-owned file) is finer than Jack's section grain. Combine: matrix legibility at field resolution.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-5/DM-13 (field grain) overlaid with [Jack] section-12 ownership matrix (machine-checkable table + write-modes); [synth] keyed at field resolution.

invariants.law: Gate the outbound, not the files. No per-file ACLs (a single operator legitimately sees all own clients; analysis spans all 33 freely). The real risk is one client's data in another's SEND — enforced at the draft boundary via single-recipient taint + cross-client hard-fail + no-raw-spend + drafts-only. There is NO send path that does not traverse gate.py; gate-bypass is a forbidden, loud-failing, blocked-and-logged operation.
invariants.why: The leak happens at the send boundary, not in the files; for a 33-client book cross-client contamination is the catastrophic failure. Jack has NO outbound gate at all — a real safety gap. Making the gate unbypassable uses Jack's danger-zone framing.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-6 / SPEC Section-8 GATE-1..5 (the gate); [Jack] section-17 danger-zone framing (gate-bypass as a catastrophic forbidden op).

invariants.law: One canonical live store; no bidirectional merge, EVER. Exactly one canonical store, split by durability class: the AUTHORED tier (durable truth) is files+local-git on the canonical host with GDrive native revision-history as a free second recovery layer; the MIRROR tier (regenerable caches with fetched_at + shelf-life) may live wherever the unattended host can reach it because losing it costs nothing (re-derived next run). Additive LLM merge is DEMOTED from a scheduled loop to a MANUAL recovery-only tool (/brain:recover-merge), invoked on a detected divergence, additive, deterministic-contradiction-resolution (canonical wins), diff-confirmed before commit. No second LIVE read/write store; the optional API/memory projection of the canonical is one-way, read-only, regenerable, never written back.
invariants.why: Bidirectional prose-merge silently loses AND fabricates data — corroborated independently by Jack's own manual ('Metamate's changes are LOST') and by the 164-silent-run disaster (personal+bidirectional+silent). The tier-split dissolves the {file+git canonical, hosted, unattended} pick-two trilemma: the trilemma only binds the un-regenerable AUTHORED tier, which gets proven file+git recovery; the regenerable MIRROR tier can ride the hosted scheduler's reachable store with a 0-files-written heartbeat guard. Recovery-only merge keeps Jack's recovery value without the always-on loss/fabrication surface.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-7 (one store, no merge) + [Jack] GDrive-version-history-is-the-durable-layer evidence + [synth] tier-split that resolves the host trilemma + [ext] GROUND consensus (single-canonical-store, append-only, no bidirectional merge across all 3 research angles). REV3's bare MM2-canonical flip is NOT rubber-stamped: corrected to tier-split files-canonical-for-authored.

invariants.law: Mirror live, author durably; staleness is structural, not policy. SoR-derived facts are thin regenerable MIRROR caches (every value carries source + fetched_at + class shelf-life; freely deletable; query-live-first; never served stale-as-fresh). Synthesized judgment is the durable AUTHORED tier. Evidence past shelf-life is EXCLUDED from evidence-attachment and the clearance gate, and queued to the hygiene sweep. The human-legible per-account data_freshness block is COMPUTED from the underlying fetched_at stamps (cannot drift), not hand-maintained. Deep Presto analyses are the one MIRROR artifact with retain:true (high regeneration cost) and are therefore the only mirror artifact backed up.
invariants.why: Co-mingling live spend with durable strategy makes staleness a policy question ('did anyone run /refresh?') instead of a structural one (cache expires automatically). Jack's data_freshness block is hand-maintained and can drift; computing it from fetched_at removes that drift. A 45-day-old headroom curve cited live in a QBR is the staleness lie the shelf-life machinery exists to prevent.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-8/DM-5/DM-6 (structural freshness) + [Jack] data_freshness block (legible display, recomputed) + [Jack] analyses/ folder as retain:true mirror artifact + [synth] computed-not-hand-maintained.

invariants.law: Draft-only at launch (autonomy rung 0); graduate only on numeric criteria, never self-granted. There are TWO ladders. SEND ladder: rung 0 draft-only (everything) -> rung 1 one-tap (follow-up nudges/meeting-confirmations/report-deliveries; gate = N consecutive clean sends in category) -> rung 2 batch (cadence follow-ups/routine cited answers; gate = sustained rung 1 + zero clearance failures in QA) -> rung 3 auto-send+notify (confirmations + scheduled report sends ONLY; gate = explicit policy sign-off + instant recall + weekly audit). Pitches/objection-handling/numeric/emotional capped at rung 1 PERMANENTLY. WRITE ladder: generated files = rung 3 (overwrite freely) from day one; append-only = rung 2; AM-confirmed = rung 1; human-owned + human-only-fields = rung 0 forever.
invariants.why: No native approval UI; external sends are highest-risk. Making both ladders explicit closes the gap where AM Brain conflated 'autonomy' with 'send autonomy' — Jack's ownership matrix IS a write-autonomy specification. Gate scoped to N-consecutive-clean rather than a fixed weekly sample so it is satisfiable at solo send volume.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-9 / SPEC OUT-5/OUT-6 (send ladder) + [synth] explicit WRITE ladder derived from Jack's ownership matrix; [ext] verdict correction on satisfiable gate threshold.

invariants.law: Poll on schedule; there is no event path. Tiered polling: Tier1 schedule (free) -> Tier2 cache-diff filter (cheap, NO LLM, zero-network local stage-clock advancing days_in_stage from cached stage_entered_at; gates ~90% of cheap exits) -> Tier3 agent wake (LLM, only when work found). An independent unconditional 12h timer runs the 96h transcript-capture sweep, bypassing the cost filter. Heavy analytics (180d diagnostic, headroom, cpa-v-spend) have no cheap precondition and run on explicit monthly/pre-QBR cadence, NOT through Tier2.
invariants.why: No event bus exists. The Tier2 local stage-clock is the cheapest-correct way to detect 14d/28d attribution-window and overdue-commitment crossings; forcing heavy analytics through a Tier2 gate is a false economy (the precondition check would itself need a Presto pull). The 96h window is a hard data-expiry deadline so transcript capture cannot be cost-optimized away.
invariants.provenance: [AM] I-10 (tiered poll + 96h sweep) + [Jack] cadence-as-cost-control for heavy analytics (frequency-tiering for jobs with no cheap precondition).

invariants.law: Single-threaded writer; intelligence sub-agents are read-only. Exactly one logical writer mutates files; it is enforced single-writer-BY-CONSTRUCTION (cron is the sole scheduled writer; human edits arrive via a different surface the cron never read-modify-writes) plus an advisory atomic-mkdir/sentinel lock as a crash/reentrancy + fail-loud guard (NOT a hard mutex on an eventually-consistent store). Sub-agents (evidence-finder, benchmark-fetcher, meeting-prep researcher) and read-only mobile lookup return distilled conclusions + source refs; they MUST NOT draft outbound or write files. A true second WRITER is admitted only behind an explicit gate (8 consecutive green weeks + DSS-matrix implemented + DISJOINT writable partition where no two writers share a writable path, verified per the actual skill->agent map).
invariants.why: Parallel writers make conflicting decisions because actions carry implicit decisions sub-agents can't see (Cognition P12, 3-0 adversarially verified, corroborated by Anthropic's production lead-writer/read-only-subagent pattern). Jack's 5-agent concurrent-write fleet works ONLY by papering over races with the bidirectional merge I-7 rejects. The disjoint-partition graduation gate makes the merge unnecessary (writers never share a writable file, so there is no conflict to merge). On an eventually-consistent store an API lock is only probabilistic, so the real guarantee is by-construction + the lock is defense-in-depth.
invariants.provenance: [AM] ORCH-1/ORCH-2 (single writer, read-only subagents) + [Jack] mkdir-lock + task-queue + disjoint-partition + danger-zone (imported as latent gated-future infra) + [ext] Cognition P12 / Anthropic multi-agent corroboration + verdict correction (by-construction, not a hard mutex).

invariants.law: Additive history with archive-not-hoard; the agent never deletes. interactions/raw is write-once create-only (in-place edit blocked+logged; corrections via a NEW tombstone-referenced entry not_true:<claim>; do_not_rederive:true). The agent MAY NOT delete any file in any class — deletion is operator-only; the monthly stale-context review is a cockpit DELETE-CANDIDATE hygiene queue the human approves. Archival (raw -> monthly digest -> archive/) is MOVE-not-delete and allowed autonomously ONLY when git + the off-host backup are confirmed for the period; otherwise it downgrades to a candidate. Roll-up/cap bounds apply to every growth-bearing file (narrative half-year shards, rs-ledger open-vs-archive split) so no single file breaches the store's per-file ceiling.
invariants.why: Jack's immutability-for-interactions is correct (a CI record edited after the fact silently rewrites history the pacing engine counts); his never-delete-ANYTHING is a workaround for additive-only sync that AM Brain doesn't need (git + backup let it archive safely). Autonomous deletion is the highest-blast-radius op with no upside. The tombstone closes the gap where a retracted fact is resurrected by re-ingesting an old transcript. Roll-up bounds prevent the monolith hazard the decomposition exists to kill.
invariants.provenance: [Jack] additive-only/immutable-interactions/never-delete (the safety floor) + [AM] git-backed archive lifecycle + DM-10 tombstone + DM-11 bloat caps (the recovery-enabled hygiene) + [synth]/[ext-verdict] roll-up bounds for narrative/rs-ledger.

invariants.law: Registry is sacred and stable; validate-before-write. _system/registry.yaml is the single corruption single-point (a bad write breaks every account lookup) — schema-validate on every load and before every write, write-lock it, git-commit it. It holds STABLE join-keys + resolution data only (slug, display_name, crm_name, search_aliases[], status, in_portfolio, tier, org_id, account_team_id, ad_account_ids[], sfid, narrative_path, narrative_source_url?, dossier_path). Volatile counts (rs_count/rs_pitched/rs_adopted, scorecard_status, data_freshness, updated_at, confidence) are EXCLUDED — they are generated and live in the per-account context.md header + scorecard. Resolution order: slug -> display_name -> crm_name -> search_aliases. ad_account spend/perf pulls ALWAYS bind IN(all ad_account_ids) — a single id undercounts up to 70%.
invariants.why: A master registry mutated on every count change is a write-amplification + single-point-corruption hazard Jack himself flags. status (CRM lifecycle) and in_portfolio (does THIS AM book it; 43-vs-33) are orthogonal and both load-bearing. Jack's resolution order (adding crm_name fallback) is strictly better than name/alias-only. YAML (not JSON) because the operator hand-edits human-owned fields and YAML permits comments — behind a validate-on-load guard since it is the corruption single-point.
invariants.provenance: [Jack] index.yaml is-sacred + validate-before-write + crm_name resolution + ad_account discovery (ACDP) + [AM] lean join-keys + in_portfolio + IN(all-ids) 70%-undercount rule + [synth] merged superset with volatile counts excluded.

layers.role: Re-run the NATIVE/BUILDABLE/IMPOSSIBLE capability audit before building any new capability; carry corrections; consult the danger-zone forbidden-operations list before any new write surface. Where a platform capability is missing, implement the listed fallback (never a silent omission).
layers.built_from: [AM] SPEC CAP-1..2 / capability-audit.md + [Jack] section-17 danger-zone catalog promoted to a machine-checkable forbidden-ops list.

layers.role: ONE canonical store, tier-split by durability. AUTHORED tier = files + local-git on the canonical host (.git on LOCAL DISK, never on the cloud FUSE mount; working tree may be on the mount, markdown one-way-synced to it) with GDrive native revision-history as a free second recovery layer and a nightly off-host git bundle + git fsck tripwire for DR. MIRROR tier = regenerable caches with fetched_at + shelf-life, may live on the host-reachable store (MM2 projection allowed), 0-files-written heartbeat guard, NOT backed up (except retain:true analyses). Single-threaded writer by-construction + advisory atomic-mkdir/sentinel lock. No second live read/write store; no bidirectional merge.
layers.built_from: [AM] I-7/I-8 two-tier + single-writer + [Jack] GDrive-version-history-durable-layer + mkdir-lock + file-health-limits + [synth] tier-split + [ext] GROUND single-canonical-store consensus + verdict corrections (git-on-local-disk invariant, GDrive-revisions-as-bonus-until-verified, fsck tripwire).

layers.role: pipeline.py runs READ-ONLY pulls in TWO kernel-separated legs (default-kernel leg: spend-live/rs/ci/transcript/calendar/email/crm_status via jf-graphql tunnel + meta CLIs; analytics-kernel leg: EOS/spend-fallback/p5-adoption/180d-diagnostics via Presto) into the MIRROR cache. Standardized self-describing envelope {step,status,time_ms,transport,kernel,spend_source_rung,id_match_mode,fetched_at,account_count,data,error}. Numeric-ID match first (text only as logged fallback); registry IN(all ad_account_ids); 3-rung spend cascade (GraphQL ad_insights -> edw_bir01.fct_ad_account_daily_revenue_split -> bi.fct_account_rolling_stats) with a zero/non-finite/empty guard; a failed pull renders unknown, never 0; documented dead-end registry (do-not-retry).
layers.built_from: [AM] fat-Python pipeline + numeric-ID-match + IN(all-ids) + envelope + dead-ends + l12-territory fallback + [Jack] named Presto tables + Tier1/Tier2 spend cascade + kernel non-mixing + ACDP discovery + [synth] two-transport, kernel-grouped legs, extended envelope.

layers.role: Decomposed two-tier per-account dossier (MIRROR: performance.md, rs-ledger.md (open) + rs-archive (closed), interactions/<YYYY-MM>.md digest + interactions/raw-<date>-<type>.md (flattened, <=3 levels), contacts.md, analyses/<type>-<date>.md retain:true; AUTHORED: profile.md, relationship.md, style.md, narrative.md (half-year shards) + commitments.md). One auto-built read-only per-account context.md rollup (generated; header = computed data_freshness block + scorecard_status + rs counts) gives Jack's single-glance value with no write-contention. narrative.md is in-vault, dual-loaded with the structured dossier on every client-scoped read; the external Google Doc (if kept) is an upstream ingestion source only. Merged registry.yaml + config.md single-constants-source. Retrieval defaults to slug-read + grep + per-prompt recall hook (FAISS/BM25 opt-in past ~5K chunks); per-client retrieval scoping (RET-1) is index-level, not prompt-level.
layers.built_from: [AM] two-tier decomposed dossier + narrative dual-load + config.md + retrieval default + [Jack] ownership matrix + analyses/ folder + rich registry + data_freshness legibility + file-health limits + [synth] generated context.md rollup + merged registry + verdict fixes (flatten interactions/raw to <=3 levels, half-year narrative shards, rs open-vs-archive split).

layers.role: Deterministic banded engine: ALG-1 pace, ALG-2 coverage, ALG-3 solution-mix, ALG-4 evidence-attachment, ALG-5 RS-rank (rules-first-numbers-last + question-fallback), ALG-6 recovery, ALG-7 hygiene, ALG-8 cockpit — pure functions in engine/classifiers.py + render.py, named constants in config.md, unit-tested against SPEC fixtures TEST-1..16. PLUS Jack's analyses suite REFACTORED into engine/analyses/{diagnostic(ALG-9 trajectory),headroom(ALG-10 log-curve),cpa_v_spend(ALG-11 regression),levers(ALG-12 adoption),revenue_commentary(ALG-13 operator-only)} — pure functions emitting a typed AnalysisResult with born-clearance-classed fields, golden-fixture tested, math NEVER in the prompt. Each AnalysisResult emits DM-EVID objects feeding ALG-4 via an explicit producer->consumer contract (pinned with a safeParse seam test); a decisive analysis signal can set evidence_readiness=strong or suppress/raise an RS while still only setting a categorical band. Calibration honesty (CONF-1 / [UNCALIBRATED CURVE] / insufficient_data bucket) wraps everything.
layers.built_from: [AM] ALG-1..8 banded engine + calibration stack + [Jack] 5-analysis suite (capability) + [synth] analyses-as-tested-Python + analysis->evidence->ranking producer-consumer contract + deterministic trajectory enum.

layers.role: Draft-boundary clearance gate (gate.py): single-recipient taint + cross-client hard-fail + no-raw-spend/[NEEDS CLEARED BENCHMARK] + drafts-only, backed by the full GATE-1..5 claim-type x source-class decision table, default-deny, claims-register-or-INVALID, escalation taxonomy (never autonomous). The gate is UNBYPASSABLE (gate-bypass = forbidden loud-failing blocked-and-logged op). Write-guard enforces the ownership matrix + human-only-fields + immutability on EVERY write. Two autonomy ladders (SEND + WRITE). Every proposal/decision -> Context Ledger + append-only DM-AUDIT (preserves evidence-shown-at-approval-time). Single-writer-now; gated multi-agent future (disjoint-partition + DSS-matrix + 8-green-weeks).
layers.built_from: [AM] gate.py 3-rule + GATE-1..5 + escalation taxonomy + autonomy ladder + audit ledger + [Jack] ownership matrix + human-only-fields + danger-zone framing (gate unbypassable) + [synth] write-guard + two ladders + gated-fleet graduation.

layers.role: Tiered-poll scheduler, host-portable. SHIP-NOW: on-demand on the LAPTOP (launchd: /morning 07:00 SGP weekdays + 12h transcript sweep) against the existing FUSE GDrive mount + local git + python — I-7 intact, zero infra; a tiny Metamate Automation serves as the hosted 07:00 NUDGE (pings/writes a one-cell work-due Sheet, never touches files) for laptop-closed coverage. MATURITY: persistent Meta devserver crontab/systemd-timer with the vault mclone-mounted (git on local disk per VERIFY-1), once a devserver is provisioned. /cron daemon discipline (RLIMIT_AS=8GB, track last-dispatch no-double-fire, stagger >=1min, batch-and-assemble). Loud-failure discipline: heartbeat.jsonl per run, 0-written-when-due = HARD FAIL, weekly health-check asserting recency + climbing run-count + token-freshness + backup-rows>0, auto re-arm on breach.
layers.built_from: [AM] tiered poll + 96h sweep + /cron discipline + loud-failure guardrails + option-3-laptop-ship-now + [Jack] hosted-scheduler-runs-laptop-closed + Confucius-grant prerequisite + cadence-for-heavy-analytics + [synth] Automation-as-nudge (hosted trigger, not file I/O).

layers.role: SPEC fixtures TEST-1..16 are the engine acceptance suite; golden-fixture tests for ALG-9..13 analyses; producer->consumer safeParse seam tests; concurrency test (cron-vs-interactive no-silent-loss; lock stale-timeout); golden question set (20/playbook) + weekly grounding QA (sample 20 sent claims, human-verify vs citation, target >95%, any clearance violation = sev-1); operating metrics (pacing attainment, draft acceptance + edit distance, overdue-commitments trend, cockpit %-acted-on, operator gardening minutes/week). Eval-judge harness reuses Sales AI grounding.
layers.built_from: [AM] SPEC Section-14 conformance + eval-judge reuse + [ext] cross-slice-seam safeParse discipline + concurrency-test-before-deploy (GROUND verdicts).

storage_ruling.decision: ONE canonical live store, TIER-SPLIT by durability class, with single-writer-by-construction + an advisory atomic lock + a one-way versioned off-host backup + a recovery-only (never scheduled) additive merge. The AUTHORED tier (un-regenerable truth: profile/relationship/style/narrative/commitments + _system) is files + LOCAL-DISK git on the canonical host, with GDrive native revision-history as a free second recovery layer (treated as a bonus until verified) and a nightly off-host git bundle + git fsck tripwire as primary DR. The MIRROR tier (regenerable caches: performance/rs-ledger/interactions/contacts/analyses, all fetched_at-stamped) may live on whatever store the unattended host can natively reach (an MM2 read-projection is permitted) because losing it costs nothing — it is re-derived next run, guarded by a 0-files-written-when-due HARD FAIL. The .git object store MUST reside on local disk, never on the cloud FUSE mount (the mount carries only the working tree; if the canonical host is a FUSE mount, git stays on local disk and markdown is one-way synced TO the mount). NO second live read/write store; the optional API/memory projection is one-way, read-only, regenerable, never written back; if an out-of-band edit ever lands in the projection it goes to a quarantine ledger drained by the manual /brain:recover-merge tool. This is the genuinely stronger model the verdicts force: it keeps REV3's single-canonical-store PRINCIPLE and the cross-source compounding consensus (single store + append-only + no bidirectional merge) AND Jack's production durability evidence (files+git+revision-history is the proven-recoverable layer) AND unblocks the unattended host (the tier-split dissolves REV3's {file+git canonical, hosted, unattended} pick-two trilemma — the trilemma only binds the un-regenerable AUTHORED tier, which gets file+git; the regenerable MIRROR tier can ride the hosted scheduler's reachable store).
storage_ruling.rationale: The chief-architect harvest's files-canonical hybrid was OVERTURNED 2/3 on the durability headline (git-on-a-cloud-FUSE-mount can itself corrupt — rclone-mount instability, the documented 'Google Drive Sync corrupting git repositories' class, and the operator's OWN untested VERIFY-1 'git-inside-the-mclone-mount NOT YET TESTED'), and one skeptic showed the tier-split is STRICTLY stronger than both pure REV3 and pure files-canonical. The three independent GROUND research angles (concurrency, pkm-compounding, ai-memory) converge unanimously: bidirectional sync silently loses data via last-write-wins races (corroborated by Jack's own manual: 'Metamate's changes are LOST'); single-canonical-store + append-only + one-way backup is the 2026 production consensus (Salesforce write-gates, Mem0, Anthropic client-side-canonical, Karpathy compiled-wiki supersession); the hard problem is what-to-remember + preventing retrieval from quietly-lying, not the backend. The tier-split is correct because durability policy DIFFERS by content: un-regenerable authored truth NEEDS proven recovery (files+local-git+revisions+off-host-bundle, two independent recovery layers); regenerable mirror caches need NONE (re-derived from SoR), so they can satisfy the hosted-scheduler reachability requirement without betting durable truth on a late-beta store with an unverified ~100KB cap, opaque retention, and a ~23-mission silent-stop bug. The recovery-only merge keeps Jack's documented recovery value (additive-merge converts a lost edit from permanent to recoverable) while removing the always-on loss/fabrication surface AM Brain rejects — the two parents are reconcilable on this point, not mutually exclusive. Single-writer-by-construction (cron is the sole scheduled writer; human edits via a different surface the cron never read-modify-writes) is the real guarantee; the atomic-mkdir lock is defense-in-depth crash/reentrancy + fail-loud, NOT a hard mutex (an API lock over an eventually-consistent store is only probabilistic). Jack's locking + task-queue-seam + file-health-limits + validate-before-write registry are all harvested as the production-hardened concurrency layer; only his bidirectional-merge + multi-live-writer fleet are dropped (they exist solely to serve concurrent multi-daily-driver writes a solo AM lacks).
rejected_alternatives: REV3 bare single-store-on-MM2 (canonical = Metamate project memory, files+git demoted to nightly backup): LOSES durability of the canonical copy — bets un-regenerable authored truth on a late-beta store with an unverified ~100KB/file cap + truncation (one oversized narrative.md = silent loss), opaque version-recovery/retention, and a known ~23-mission silent-stop bug; demotes the only proven-recoverable layer (files+git+GDrive-revisions) to a nightly backup, regressing from continuous per-edit history to a backup-window gap; and CONTRADICTS AM Brain's own ship-now recommendation (§11 'Now -> option 3', laptop files+git on-demand, which IS file-canonical). The tier-split keeps everything MM2-canonical uniquely buys (the regenerable tier can ride MM2 for hosted reach) without this loss.

Full Jack bidirectional sync (GDrive primary + MM2 secondary, 30-min cycle, LLM additive merge, GDrive-wins-on-conflict): LOSES simplicity AND safety for a solo operator — the 30-min always-on prose-merge buys nothing without a second concurrent live daily-driver (the solo AM has one writer) and carries the documented 'Metamate's changes are LOST' cost plus LLM-fabrication risk (the merge LLM preferentially selects generated over retrieved content, embedding that bias permanently in the narrative); the 5-agent fleet + N-by-N task-queue + dual-lock machinery is over-built for one operator. Async/batch usage (the likely solo pattern) makes silent merge losses MORE likely to hide than in Jack's daily-active usage.

Pure files-canonical hybrid (the chief-architect harvest's original: ALL tiers on files+git on a single FUSE host, headline 'strictly more durable than REV3'): OVERTURNED 2/3 — the unconditional durability headline is not defensible because git-on-a-cloud-FUSE-mount can itself corrupt (rclone-mount instability, documented GDrive-sync git-corruption class, the operator's own untested git-in-mclone-mount VERIFY-1), and it does NOT unblock the unattended host (the persistent devserver it needs is unprovisionable per the L6 spike, and the Automations-as-nudge fallback only pings the operator to open the laptop, so its ceiling is operator-ATTENDED — surrendering the laptop-closed daily cockpit MM2-canonical uniquely buys). The tier-split fixes both: git-on-local-disk invariant closes the corruption hole, and pushing only the regenerable mirror tier to the host-reachable store restores laptop-closed operation for the cockpit.

section_outline.title: Thesis — compounding knowledge store WITH a calibration-honest decision engine
section_outline.scope: The dual-and-layered center of gravity (compiled wiki feeding a tested decision engine, named-skill surface over a tested engine); why it is stronger than EITHER parent (Jack's production assets on AM Brain's principled spine; inherits neither's catastrophic failure mode); why it is genuinely unserved by Meta's read-only stateless single-account Sales AI; the reuse-not-rebuild stance where they overlap.

section_outline.title: Invariants — the reconciled law (I-1..I-13)
section_outline.scope: The single numbered list folding AM Brain I-1..I-10 with Jack's laws (additive-only/never-delete, per-section single-owner, immutable interactions, registry-is-sacred, danger-zone). Each law: statement + why + provenance. Conflicts resolved inline (e.g. I-7 single-store-no-merge corrected to tier-split; I-5 field-grain overlaid with Jack's matrix; I-11 single-writer-by-construction not hard-mutex; I-12 immutability+tombstone+roll-up bounds).

section_outline.title: The storage / sync / concurrency / durability ruling (FEATURED)
section_outline.scope: The settled decision: ONE canonical store, tier-split by durability, single-writer-by-construction + advisory lock + one-way versioned off-host backup + recovery-only additive merge; git-on-local-disk invariant; AUTHORED=files+git+revisions, MIRROR=host-reachable+regenerable. The head-to-head (REV3 bare-MM2 vs full-Jack-bidirectional vs pure-files-hybrid) with what each loses. The evidence chain (Jack's own loss admission + 3 GROUND consensus angles + verdict overturns). The host-trilemma dissolution. Rejected alternatives + confidence.

section_outline.title: Layer model + system diagram
section_outline.scope: L0 capability gate, L1 storage (tier-split), L2 data plane (two kernel-legs), L3 knowledge/memory (decomposed dossier), L4 decision engine + analytics, L5 safety/governance, L6 runtime/host, Ln conformance. The full system diagram (operator -> generation -> draft-boundary gate -> drafts; decision engine + retrieval reading two-tier knowledge; data plane + ingestion feeding it; tiered-poll runtime driving it). Each layer's role + built-from provenance.

section_outline.title: Knowledge / memory model & file layout
section_outline.scope: The decomposed two-tier dossier (mirror vs authored, opposite durability policies), the generated read-only per-account context.md rollup, in-vault narrative.md dual-load (Google Doc demoted to ingestion source), the merged registry.yaml schema (stable keys, volatile counts excluded, resolution order), config.md single-constants-source, the two-granularity freshness model (structural enforcement + computed legible display), write-policy classes, file-health limits, the verdict fixes (flatten interactions/raw to <=3 levels, half-year narrative shards, rs open-vs-archive split, analyses retain:true).

section_outline.title: Skills & operating loops — 12 named skills over a tested engine
section_outline.scope: The 12-skill catalog (/morning[--weekly], /prep, /capture[--quick], /log, /sweep, /refresh, /pitch-priorities, /calendar, /analyze, /brief, /setup, /handoff) + freeform query path + auto-cockpit cron; each skill = thin wrapper (engine math -> LLM language -> ownership-matrix write) with READS/WRITES(tier+mode)/backing-ALG/engine-vs-LLM-split; the merges (/morning+/sweep render-modes, /post-meeting+/log-interaction --quick, 3 analyses -> /analyze); the daily/weekly/monthly rhythm; required_kernel tags; the one-line engine-vs-LLM split rule.

section_outline.title: Decision engine & analytics — the deterministic cortex + grafted analyses
section_outline.scope: ALG-1..8 banded engine verbatim (rules-first-numbers-last, R0->R4 ranking, calibration honesty); the AnalysisResult contract + the five grafted analyses ALG-9..13 (trajectory/headroom/cpa-v-spend/levers/revenue-commentary) refactored to tested Python with born-clearance-classed fields + golden fixtures + [UNCALIBRATED CURVE]/insufficient_data guards; the analysis->DM-EVID->ALG-4->ALG-5 producer-consumer seam (decisive signal sets evidence_readiness=strong / suppresses-raises an RS, band-only, I-2 intact) pinned with a safeParse test; cockpit + scorecard integration (trajectory-sourced risk section, diagnostics-due, operator-only weekly-review).

section_outline.title: Data plane & access
section_outline.scope: Two named transports (jf-graphql tunnel + analytics-kernel Presto) + kernel non-mixing; the canonical pull set with named tables/IDs; the standardized self-describing envelope; ID-matching discipline (numeric-first, IN(all-ids), identity-from-am-identity.json); the 3-rung spend cascade + zero/NaN guard; two-granularity freshness; dual ingestion streams (96h VC-summary sweep + daily CRM-rich-text-note) into narrative.md; the dead-end registry; data-access.md (WORKS/DEAD-ENDS/CONSTANTS).

section_outline.title: Safety, governance, autonomy & multi-agent
section_outline.scope: The draft-boundary clearance gate (3 rules + GATE-1..5 table + claims-register + cross-client hard-fail + escalation taxonomy) made unbypassable; the write-guard enforcing ownership matrix + human-only-fields + immutability; the two autonomy ladders (SEND + WRITE); the Context Ledger + append-only DM-AUDIT; single-writer-now + read-only intelligence subagents; the gated-multi-agent future (disjoint writable partition + DSS-matrix + 8-green-weeks + the no-two-writers-per-file gate check); the machine-checkable danger-zone forbidden-ops list.

section_outline.title: Runtime, scheduling & host
section_outline.scope: The tiered-poll funnel (Tier1 schedule -> Tier2 zero-network cache-diff stage-clock -> Tier3 LLM wake) + independent 12h/96h sweep + cadence-for-heavy-analytics; /cron daemon discipline; loud-failure/heartbeat discipline (0-written=HARD-FAIL, weekly health-check, auto re-arm); the SHIP-NOW laptop launchd + Metamate-Automation-as-nudge; the MATURITY persistent-devserver path (git-on-local-disk per VERIFY-1); the Confucius-grant prerequisite + token-freshness check; how the host evolves without degrading the store.

section_outline.title: Provenance map — what each parent + external grounding contributed
section_outline.scope: [AM] the contracts, ALG-1..8 engine, field-level ownership, calibration honesty, clearance gate, two-tier memory, single-writer, capability-audit method. [Jack] the named skills, ownership matrix, analyses suite, enriched registry, narrative dual-load, file-locking, danger-zone, file-health limits, kernel discipline, hosted-scheduler-laptop-closed. [synth] thin-wrapper skills, analyses-as-tested-Python, analysis->ranking seam, tier-split storage, generated context.md rollup, two autonomy ladders, gated-fleet graduation, Automation-as-nudge. [ext] Cognition P12, Anthropic multi-agent pattern, the 3 GROUND consensus angles, NaN-guard, cross-slice-seam discipline.

section_outline.title: Phased build plan
section_outline.scope: Phase 0 (capability audit + manual templates) -> Phase 1 ship-now solo core (L1 tier-split storage on laptop, L2 data plane verbatim, L3 decomposed dossier + dual-load, L4 ALG-1..8 + health-check, L5 gate + ledger, L6 laptop launchd + Automation-nudge, single-writer) -> Phase 2 calibration unblock + remaining analytics (headroom/cpa/levers/revenue) + RS engine + capture batches -> Phase 3 GATED maturity (persistent-devserver unattended loop, autonomy graduation, task-queue activation, eventual second-writer behind the disjoint-partition gate). Each phase: deliverable + gated-on.

section_outline.title: Conformance, evaluation & metrics
section_outline.scope: SPEC fixtures TEST-1..16 as the engine acceptance suite; golden-fixture tests for ALG-9..13; producer->consumer safeParse seam tests; the concurrency test (cron-vs-interactive no-silent-loss + lock stale-timeout) BEFORE deploy; golden question set (20/playbook) + weekly grounding QA (>95%, clearance-violation=sev-1); operating metrics (pacing attainment, draft acceptance + edit distance, overdue-commitments trend, cockpit %-acted-on, gardening minutes/week, sync-conflict/recovery-merge audit); eval-judge harness reuse.

section_outline.title: Open questions & blocking operator inputs
section_outline.scope: Blocking calibration inputs (ci_definition + targets, clearance rulings + cleared-benchmark library, SGP working calendar, book-plan tiers for the real 33 — until supplied every pacing surface carries PACING UNCALIBRATED). Unverified platform unknowns (MM2 per-file cap/retention/lock-atomicity, git-in-mclone-mount, persistent-devserver provisioning, GDrive-revision-retention-for-mounted-md, Unidash programmatic access, spend-zeros VERIFY, analyses curve-forms/thresholds, fct_performance5_account schema). Design decisions needing operator confirmation (12-skill merges vs Jack's separate invocations, whether to keep the external Doc, whether freeform query needs a 13th named skill, the disjoint-partition boundary for an eventual second writer).

phase_plan.deliverable: Re-run the NATIVE/BUILDABLE/IMPOSSIBLE capability audit against live tool schemas; record fallbacks (never silent omissions); build the machine-checkable danger-zone forbidden-ops list. Operator fills templates (top-10 dossiers, ~5 playbooks, manual ledgers) so the daily loop is usable by hand via the cockpit/prep/capture prompts before any automation.
phase_plan.gated_on: live tool schemas; operator availability for template fill.

phase_plan.phase: Phase 1 — SHIP-NOW solo core (single-writer, draft-only, laptop)
phase_plan.deliverable: L1 tier-split storage on the laptop (AUTHORED files + LOCAL-DISK git + GDrive-revisions + nightly off-host bundle + fsck tripwire; MIRROR regenerable caches; single-writer-by-construction + advisory atomic-mkdir lock; NO bidirectional merge). L2 data plane ported verbatim (two-transport pulls + envelope + numeric-ID-match + IN(all-ids) + 3-rung spend cascade + dead-ends); locked validated registry.yaml. L3 decomposed two-tier dossier + dual-load + generated context.md rollup + simple retrieval + recall hook + CRM-note/96h ingestion into narrative.md. L4 ALG-1..8 banded engine with new tests against SPEC fixtures TEST-1..16 + the single highest-leverage analysis (ALG-9 health-check trajectory, drives risk/coverage). L5 gate.py (3 rules + GATE-1..5) + write-guard (ownership matrix + human-only-fields + immutability) + Context Ledger + DM-AUDIT, gate unbypassable, SEND ladder at rung 0. L6 laptop launchd (/morning 07:00 SGP weekdays + 12h transcript sweep) + a tiny Metamate Automation as the hosted 07:00 nudge + /cron discipline + loud-failure heartbeat/health-check. Strangler-fig cutover from the live daily driver, account-by-account, archive-not-delete.
phase_plan.gated_on: Phase 0 audit + fallbacks; data paths verified; the cron-vs-interactive concurrency test passing (no silent loss, lock stale-timeout); git-on-local-disk confirmed.

phase_plan.phase: Phase 2 — calibration unblock + full analytics + RS engine + capture
phase_plan.deliverable: Land the blocking operator inputs (ci_definition + targets, clearance rulings + cleared-benchmark library, SGP working calendar, book-plan tiers) so the cockpit goes calibrated (PACING UNCALIBRATED banner clears). Add the remaining deep analyses ALG-10 headroom / ALG-11 cpa-v-spend / ALG-12 levers / ALG-13 revenue-commentary as tested Python with golden fixtures + [UNCALIBRATED CURVE]/insufficient_data guards; wire the analysis->DM-EVID->ALG-4->ALG-5 producer-consumer seam (safeParse-pinned) so analyses feed ranking. Full /capture batch (CI record + follow-up draft + commitment + RS-state as one approval batch) + commitments memory. Complete the 12-skill catalog as thin wrappers. Eval-judge harness + weekly grounding QA active.
phase_plan.gated_on: Phase 1 core stable; operator inputs supplied; spend-zeros VERIFY resolved; analyses curve-forms/thresholds supplied (golden fixtures).

phase_plan.phase: Phase 3 — GATED maturity (unattended host, autonomy graduation, multi-agent)
phase_plan.deliverable: Move the daily-driver + sweep onto a persistent Meta devserver crontab/systemd-timer (git on local disk per VERIFY-1; vault mclone-mounted) for fully-unattended laptop-closed operation, once a persistent devserver is provisioned. Graduate SEND-ladder categories per numeric criteria (rung 1 follow-ups/confirmations after N consecutive clean sends; pitches/numeric/emotional stay capped at rung 1 permanently). Activate the cron->operator task-queue handoff lane (and Jack's 3h worker) when a graduated send must execute on a foreign surface. Admit a true SECOND WRITER only behind the explicit gate: 8 consecutive green weeks on LOOP metrics + Agent-IO-Security DSS-matrix implemented + a DISJOINT writable partition verified (no two writers share a writable path under the actual skill->agent map). Re-open canonical=MM2 only as a deliberate future fork IF MM2's cap/retention/silent-stop are all closed AND a redundancy story exists.
phase_plan.gated_on: Phase 2 metrics green 8 consecutive weeks; persistent-devserver provisioned + git-in-mount VERIFY closed; DSS-matrix integration; disjoint-partition specified + verified; policy sign-off for any rung-3 send.

field-resolution ownership matrix (Jack's section table + AM Brain's field grain) + required_kernel tags carried as a conditional host constraint

external: Cognition 'Don't Build Multi-Agents' P12 (3-0 adversarially verified): parallel writers make conflicting decisions — the highest-evidence claim grounding single-writer-now
Anthropic production multi-agent research system: lead agent writes, subagents read-only/synchronous — independent corroboration of the ORCH-1 posture
GROUND concurrency angle (Stacksync + single-writer/Orleans): bidirectional sync silently loses data via last-write-wins races; single-writer achieves strong consistency without merge complexity

GROUND pkm-compounding angle (Karpathy compiled-wiki + Zettelkasten/evergreen + 'Blinded by Generated Contexts' arXiv 2401.11911 + evolving-memory SSGM arXiv 2603.11768): compounding needs one-directional flow + supersession; LLM merge biases toward generated-over-retrieved content (a hallucination sink); one-way backup is structurally safer than bidirectional sync

GROUND ai-memory angle (Salesforce write-gates + Mem0 2026 + Anthropic client-side-canonical + Oracle staleness): single-canonical-store + append-only + write-gates-before-storage is the 2026 production consensus; append-only without supersession creates 'benign data corruption' (agents reuse stale facts with false confidence)

project-memory NaN-blind comparison gates: Number.isFinite-guard every external numeric (comparison gates pass NaN as all-false) + the cross-slice-seam lesson (pin every producer->consumer seam with a safeParse test)

verdict overturns: git-on-cloud-FUSE-mount corruption class (rclone instability + GDrive-sync git-corruption) forcing the git-on-local-disk invariant; the tier-split as strictly stronger than both pure-REV3 and pure-files-hybrid; the concurrency-test-before-deploy requirement
industry backup-vs-sync consensus (one-way backup preserves deletion-recovery; bidirectional sync propagates deletions/corruptions catastrophically)
